message:
fix(reliability): add setTimeout cleanup to copy button components

Add proper timeout cleanup on unmount to prevent memory leaks and
setState calls on unmounted components:
- QuickAccessBar.tsx: Add copyTimeoutRef and cleanup effect
- AgentCardContent.tsx: Add copyTimeoutRef and cleanup effect
- tool-page-content.tsx: Add copyTimeoutRef and cleanup effect

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
